ModMetaData.name: Mod Fixes Pack
ModMetaData.description:
A consolidated patch pack for large RimWorld mods. Each fix only activates if its target mod is loaded — safe to install even if you don't have all the patched mods. More fixes will be added over time.
CURRENT FIXES:
--- Dynamic Diplomacy (Continued) ---
- Terrain validation: rejects battle tiles and conquest targets on problematic terrain. Retries with better tiles before giving up. Works alongside Geological Landforms. Rejects: - Impassable mountains (vanilla mountain tiles) - Extreme cliffs from Geological Landforms - Cave topology - Ocean/water-covered tiles - Extreme temperature biomes (below -20°C or above 50°C) — covers Alpha Biomes, HMC Biomes, Vile's Biomes, etc. where pawns can't survive long enough to resolve a battle
- Shambler/infection deadlock: when pawns switch factions mid-battle (e.g., get infected and become shamblers), they're now cleaned from the battle faction lists so DD's win check works correctly. Prevents battle maps from staying open forever.
- Hard timeout failsafe: if a battle runs past 7 game days without ending, force it to end via DD's timeout mechanism.
- HSK-tuned event rates: reduces DD event frequency from vanilla pace (3-5 conquests per 60 days) to HSK pace (1-2 conquests per 90 days). Matches the slower HSK progression curve. Per-event changes: - NPC_Conquest: 3-5 per 60d with 0.5d spacing → 1-2 per 90d with 20d spacing - NPC_DiploChange: 2-4 per 60d with 5d spacing → 1-2 per 60d with 15d spacing - NPC_Expansion: 1-2 per 60d with 15d spacing → 1 per 90d with 30d spacing - NPC_Convert: 1-2 per 120d with 30d spacing → 1 per 180d with 60d spacing
--- Geological Landforms ---
- Shared terrain utility used by DD fixes. Checks tile topology (CliffAllSides, CliffValley, etc.) to avoid problematic battle maps.
COMPATIBILITY: - All fixes are conditional — inactive if the target mod isn't loaded - Zero overhead if a mod is missing - Safe to install on any save - Works with HSK (Hardcore SK) and vanilla
All logs are prefixed with [Mod Fixes Pack] for easy filtering in the debug console.
